answers.bp_howToBook: You can book directly on our website by selecting your desired destination and dates, or by contacting our customer support team.
answers.bp_paymentMethods: We accept Credit Card (Visa, Mastercard), and Bank Transfer. All payments are securely processed.
answers.bp_installments: Yes, for certain travel packages, we offer the option to pay in installments. Please check the specific conditions of your booking or contact us for more information.
answers.cc_policy: Our cancellation policy varies depending on the booked service (flight, hotel, package). You can view our full Cancellation Policy in the 'Legal' section of our site or in your booking details.
answers.cc_canIChange: Changes are possible but may be subject to fees and supplier availability. We recommend contacting us as soon as possible to check the options.
answers.dt_passport: For most destinations, you need a valid passport with at least 6 months of validity. For specific destinations, additional documents may be required. Always check the requirements of your destination before traveling.
answers.dt_visa: Visa requirements vary depending on the destination and your nationality. Some countries allow entry without a visa for short stays, while others require a visa in advance. We always inform about the specific requirements during the booking process.
answers.dt_travelInsurance: Although it's not always mandatory, we strongly recommend taking travel insurance. It provides medical emergency coverage, cancellation, baggage loss, and other incident protection during your trip.
answers.dt_healthRequirements: Some destinations may require specific vaccinations or health certificates. Always consult your doctor and check the requirements of the destination country. We can provide general information, but we recommend consulting a specialized medical practitioner.
answers.ds_popularDestinations: Our most popular destinations include Portugal (Lisbon, Porto, Algarve), Spain, Italy, France, Greece, and exotic destinations like Morocco and Cape Verde. We offer both European and international destinations.
answers.ds_customPackages: Yes! We create completely customized packages according to your preferences, budget, and specific needs. From romantic trips to family adventures, we tailor each experience to your profile.
answers.ds_groupTravel: Yes, we organize group trips for all sizes. We offer special conditions for groups, including discounts, personalized itineraries, and dedicated accompaniment. Ideal for families, friends, or corporate events.
answers.ds_localGuides: Yes, we work with a network of experienced local guides and certified in all our destinations. Our guides know the culture, history, and local secrets deeply, providing authentic and memorable experiences.
answers.lc_agencyObligations: AKMLEVA is committed to providing all contracted services with the highest quality and to providing assistance in case of unforeseen events, in accordance with current legislation.
answers.lc_travelerRights: Your rights are protected by European and national legislation. You are entitled to clear information, assistance, and compensation in applicable cases. For more details, see the Terms and Conditions.
answers.lc_complaints: You can file a complaint via our support email or by using the Electronic Complaints Book, available on our website.
answers.lc_rnavt: The RNAVT (National Registry of Travel and Tourism Agencies) is the mandatory registration that certifies that the agency operates legally in Portugal. Our number is 0000.
answers.sc_contactMethods: You can contact us by phone (+351 123 456 789), email (geral@akmleva.pt), through our online contact form, or by visiting our agency in Santa Maria da Feira. We are available Monday to Friday, 9am-6pm.
answers.sc_emergencySupport: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency support for all our clients during their trips. In case of emergency, you can contact us through the emergency number provided before the trip.
answers.sc_responseTime: We normally respond within 24 business hours. For urgent inquiries or those related to ongoing trips, we respond the same day. In case of emergency, we are available 24/7.
answers.sc_languages: We provide support in Portuguese, English, French and Spanish. Our team is multilingual and prepared to serve clients from different nationalities with the highest quality.
